title: DiGist Lobster Event
description: Event emitted by digist via polarclaw-project-sdk to SOTAgent lobster event bus.

type.description: Event type aligned with SOTAgent_LobsterEvents.md canonical enum

source_project.description: Always 'digist' for events from this project

target_project.description: Optional target project for routed events (e.g. digist_report targeting KnowLever)

payload.description: Event-specific data; structure varies by type

dedup_key.description: Deduplication key; PolarClaw uses this to avoid duplicate processing
